name: icons
title: Icons
description: The Lantern icon set: product icons exported from Figma plus the curated Lucide subset re-exported from lucide-react.

files.content:
// Generated by scripts/generate-icons.mjs — do not edit by hand.
// Lucide icons used by the Lantern design system (Figma: Lantern-Lucide-Icons, "icons pool").
export {
  Aperture,
  ArrowDown,
  ArrowDown01,
  ArrowDown10,
  ArrowDownAZ,
  ArrowDownNarrowWide,
  ArrowDownUp,
  ArrowDownWideNarrow,
  ArrowDownZA,
  ArrowLeft,
  ArrowRight,
  ArrowUp,
  ArrowUpNarrowWide,
  ArrowUpRight,
  ArrowUpWideNarrow,
  ArrowUpZA,
  AtSign,
  Atom,
  BadgeCent,
  Binoculars,
  Bold,
  Calendar1,
  ChartNoAxesCombined,
  Check,
  ChevronDown,
  ChevronLeft,
  ChevronRight,
  ChevronUp,
  ChevronsUpDown,
  CircleCheck,
  CircleQuestionMark,
  CircleStop,
  CircleX,
  Clock10,
  ClockCheck,
  CodeXml,
  Columns3,
  Command,
  Copy,
  CopyPlus,
  DatabaseZap,
  Download,
  Edit,
  Ellipsis,
  EllipsisVertical,
  FileClock,
  FileDown,
  FilePenLine,
  FileText,
  FileType,
  Flag,
  FlaskConical,
  Funnel,
  Goal,
  GripVertical,
  Hand,
  Heading1,
  Heading2,
  Heading3,
  Info,
  Italic,
  Key,
  LayoutGrid,
  Leaf,
  Link,
  List,
  ListChecks,
  ListOrdered,
  ListPlus,
  ListRestart,
  ListVideo,
  LoaderCircle,
  LockKeyhole,
  Mail,
  Maximize,
  Maximize2,
  MessageCircleMore,
  MessageCirclePlus,
  Minimize2,
  Minus,
  OctagonX,
  PanelLeft,
  PanelLeftClose,
  PanelLeftOpen,
  Paperclip,
  Phone,
  Pin,
  Play,
  Plus,
  Quote,
  RefreshCcw,
  RotateCcw,
  RotateCw,
  Route,
  Search,
  Send,
  Settings,
  Settings2,
  ShoppingBag,
  Sparkle,
  Split,
  Square,
  Star,
  Strikethrough,
  Table2,
  Terminal,
  Trash2,
  TriangleAlert,
  Underline,
  User,
  UserRoundPen,
  UserRoundSearch,
  Users,
  WandSparkles,
  X,
  Zap,
} from "lucide-react";

// Figma names that map to differently-named Lucide glyphs.
export { SquareArrowOutUpRight as OpenExternalLink } from "lucide-react";
export { TextAlignJustify as DragUpDown } from "lucide-react";
